programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A house in Chesterton in Staffordshire has a smelly problem and needs a total overhaul. The new owner of a semi in Bestwood in Nottingham also has a lot to do, while the new owner of a flat in Strawberry Hill has less than a week to sort out her auction buy before she jets off to Germany.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A husband and wife duo add their design skills to a house in Croydon in Surrey, while a seasoned developer creates a high-end house in multiple occupation in Coventry and a first time developer also does a great job with a house full of period features in Nutall in Nottinghamshire.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts meets one of two young brothers busy building a property portfolio in Bolsover, Derbyshire, while Dion Dublin checks out a three-bedroom semi in Wolverhampton, and Lucy Alexander is impressed by plans to convert a two-bedroom, fire-damaged terraced house in Londons Plaistow into a smart five-bedroom property.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin has a hair-raising experience at a barbers in Rochdale, Lancashire, while Martin Roberts looks round a great bungalow in Alsager, Cheshire, and Lucy Alexander sees all the potential in a piece of land in Eccles in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts visits a house in Otterton, Devon, which is given a stunning transformation to match the views from the windows, Lucy Alexander looks round a small one-bedroom flat in Tottenham, London, and Dion Dublin peers into a building in Alvaston, Derby, which is in a dangerous state of disrepair.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts visits a house in Otterton, Devon, which is given a stunning transformation to match the views from the windows, Lucy Alexander looks round a small one-bedroom flat in Tottenham, London, and Dion Dublin peers into a building in Alvaston, Derby, which is in a dangerous state of disrepair.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin visit a one-bedroom flat in Catford, London, a large house near the River Mersey and a semi-detached property in Alvaston in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: An end-terrace house in Alfreton in Derby bought by two brothers, a mid-terrace on the coast at Seaham in County Durham and a large three-storey property with a flat and shop in Taylorstown in the Rhondda Valley are all sold at auction. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin talk to the new owners to find out what they have planned for their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts falls in love with a quirky cottage in Malvern bought by a builder and his wife, Dion Dublin talks to a first-time property developer who sees her end-terrace house in Chell in Stoke-on-Trent as something for her pension pot, and Lucy Alexander meets a divorced couple who have decided to form a new union as property developers doing up a shop and flat in Dover, Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A large piece of land in Ratby in Leicestershire, a terrace in Chesterton in Staffordshire and a 1930s semi with a huge garden and huge potential are all sold at auction. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the developers hoping to breathe new life into their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A two-bedroom detached house in Basford in Nottingham, a top floor flat in Portsmouth and a large Edwardian terrace in Crewe are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear about their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A multimillion-pound development in Farningham in Kent, an ambitious, total renovation project in Aspatria in Cumbria and a very small studio flat in Wallington in Surrey are all sold under the hammer. Martin and Lucy meet the new owners to discuss their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A semi in Sutton Coldfield near Birmingham, a derelict house in a rural village near Dover in Kent and a basement without planning permission in Ipswich in Suffolk are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 20-year-old first-time developer, a banker turned developer and a builder who wants to create a new home for his soon-to-be-wife all buy properties at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion are in Chesterton, Hornchurch and Sudbrook to hear their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A run-down listed village house in Farningham in Kent is given the wow factor while houses in Great Barr in Birmingham and Crewe in Cheshire are also given great makeovers. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and catch up on their progress after the transformations.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy talks to a pastor and his wife who plan to build their dream eco house in Brompton in Kent. Meanwhile, Martin meets a first-time developer in Wolverhampton, and Dion looks at a huge building which already comes with a tenanted flat and a hair salon in Newcastle-under-Lyme.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A commercial and residential building in Beeston in Nottinghamshire, a four-storey house in East Dulwich in London and a flat in Godalming in Surrey are all given high-end makeovers. Will the developers, who all bought at auction, make a profit?

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s semi in Hatfield in Hertforshire, a flat in Croydon and a workshop and land in Heanor in Derbyshire are sold at auction. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the owners and hear their plans to make money from their bricks and mortar.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mum and dad buy a piece of land in Stevenage in Hertfordshire in the hope of developing a pair of houses for their children, a couple who buy a top-floor flat in Motherwell in Scotland want to make a profit on the rent, and two young brothers buy a run-down house in South Normanton.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A bungalow in Langton Green in Kent is given a high-end refurbishment and extension, a father-and-son team cleverly refigure the existing space in a terraced house in Stoke-on-Trent, and two lifelong friends have high hopes for a piece of land they buy behind a house they already own in Northwood in Middlesex.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A 1930s semi in Leamington Spa in Warwickshire, a terraced house in Londons Plumstead and a workshop on the Isle of Sheppey in Kent are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin hear about the plans for the three properties.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts catches up on ambitious plans to redevelop the site of a former school in Ebbw Vale in Wales, while Dion Dublin talks to a first-time developer planning to extend up and out at a semi in Bloxwich in the West Midlands.

programme.desc: Martin Roberts catches up on ambitious plans to redevelop the site of a former school in Ebbw Vale in Wales, while Dion Dublin talks to a first-time developer planning to extend up and out at a semi in Bloxwich in the West Midlands.

Katy complies, but when the boy fails to reappear and the couple prove to be unknown to social services, DCI Alan Banks is drawn into a full-scale search for the child.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Banks and his team now have a murder enquiry on their hands, as the body found on the moors is identified as eleven-year old Andre Petri.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When an old friend of Hathaways commits suicide, Lewis investigates a link between him and a religious group known as The Garden, who he suspects are brainwashing their congregation. However, a serial killer also knows about the organisation and has started to pick off its members one by one, leaving Lewis with only so much time to solve the case before another victim is murdered.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Vegetarian cat lover Hannah Wilson is cooking Italian in Dundee and has a cunning plan to win over her carnivore guests - dish up some meat with her starter.

programme.desc: For four seasons fans of `Teen Mom watched Farrah, Maci, Amber and Catelynn face multiple challenges in their first years of motherhood, including such things as graduating from high school, relationships, getting jobs, beginning college and moving out on their own. Oh, and raising their first child. Now the original girls - hence, the `OG in the revived series title - return to reveal the challenges of raising children on camera, and how life in the public eye has shaped them as parents and people. Its an unprecedented view of young mothers facing the responsibilities of parenthood as their children enter kindergarten, start little league and reach other milestones of youth.

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: Revealing untold stories of UFO sightings, abductions, and other paranormal events, Close Encounters Down Under is a spine-tingling investigation into some of the most bizarre alien encounters of all time. From the alps of New Zealand to the rugged Australian Outback, every episode is packed with rare footage, recently declassified archives, and chilling first-hand accounts.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies
programme.desc: In October 2017, astronomers observed the very first visitor from interstellar space: Oumuamua. Craig and Sarah speak with SETI scientists regarding its origin, and the possibility of extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: A silent, orange football shaped object is spotted over Loring Air Force Base in Maine, and a Swedish farmer witnesses a crash into a lake.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Exploring acceptance of alien contact and advancements in technology capturing more unidentified aerial phenomena sightings; a look at whether they are seeking Earths oceanic energy.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover a mysterious, unknown monster, thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Plus, a truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway causing havoc for motorists.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified
programme.desc: Are we alone in the universe? In the 80s and 90s, sightings of dark, triangular flying objects began to occur across the world - many incidents remaining unexplained.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries
programme.desc: A bizarre plane crash and an underground city point to powerful forces inside the Grand Canyon National Park.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries
programme.desc: A plane crash in Everglades National Park leads to strange hauntings on other aircraft, and two serial killers are inexplicably drawn to the murky swamps of Everglades.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: There have been doomsday signs and prophecies for centuries, and humans time on this planet may be nearly over.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Those who wish to control what others think, how they act and what they believe and new practices in mind-control.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Exploring acceptance of alien contact and advancements in technology capturing more unidentified aerial phenomena sightings; a look at whether they are seeking Earths oceanic energy.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the court of public opinion, the most credible UFO witnesses come from law enforcement.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: A strange circular forest next to a notorious cannibal site; when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Teslas doomsday device; cutting-edge tech helps experts answer these sinister mysteries.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Discover terrifying new images of a blob swallowing a city, spy ships attacking America, skydiving cannibal spiders and the radioactive killer fly factory.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: Deep sea explorers discover a mysterious, unknown monster, thousands of feet beneath the ocean. Plus, a truck spontaneously explodes on a busy freeway causing havoc for motorists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: A weird creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyse evidence of a giant scaly egg and question if it is possibly a dragons egg.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Tampered space photos, missing NASA recordings, and a race to the moon all point to one very likely possibility: alien life exists.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Exploring acceptance of alien contact and advancements in technology capturing more unidentified aerial phenomena sightings; a look at whether they are seeking Earths oceanic energy.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: In the court of public opinion, the most credible UFO witnesses come from law enforcement.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified
programme.desc: During the Cold War, sinister objects were seen flying above secret military bases. Were aliens monitoring the worlds nuclear arsenal?

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: A 10,000-gallon water tank is found to be empty after an object is spotted hovering over it, and amaranth plants wilt after a saucer-shaped craft hovers above them.

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: A policeman discovers an oval-shaped object without windows or doors, and a woman spots an aura of light surrounding a small tree.

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: Takes the UFO and Extraterrestrial Phenomenon to the next level by using investigation techniques to figure out exactly what the history is behind the mystery of some of the most well-known, extraordinary cases of the last 75 years.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Could Hitlers crazed quest for world domination have been influenced by aliens? Experts reveal the extraterrestrial secret Hitler may have been hiding and where it is now.

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Ex-U.S. Intelligence officer Grusch tells the Oversight Committee about an alien craft in U.S. secret facilities.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Some believe that mankinds survival hinges on the science of artificial intelligence.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts discover a monster graveyard; the groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: Modern imaging technology and analysis from military and intelligence professionals, as well as leading scientists, investigate mysteries from strange geological occurrences to odd man-made structures as seen by more than 4,000 orbiting satellites.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: The Stone Ball, The Electrocution Belt And The Cat Mummy That Wasnt
programme.desc: A 5,000-year-old carved stone object is shaped into four symmetrical lobes covered in unique markings. Why people believed an electrocution device could cure. And a 3,000-year-old cat mummy with no cat inside.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: The Skull That Changed Science, The Bat Bomb And The Stone Age Mulitool
programme.desc: How an appallingly injured skull changed the face of neuroscience. Asking if World War 2 really could have been won by a bat. And investigating if people really made sophisticated multipurpose tools 14,000 years ago.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: When a strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything known about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors.

programme.title: What on Earth?
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the sight of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of Americas most famous faces.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: The Hat Of Teeth, The Killer Shockbox And The Amazonian Quiver
programme.desc: Examine a hat emblazoned with teeth, a box with the power to kill, and a golden quiver from a Macedonian tomb.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: The Lost Language, The Beauty Machine And The Disk Of Strangeness

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George get caught in a thunderstorm.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is taking everyone for a drive in the country, but the car is very muddy and Mummy insists they wash it first.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When the family goes to Granny and Grandpa Pigs house for dinner, George is reluctant to eat his salad.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family go camping, but soon realise that their tent is too small for everyone, so Daddy sleeps underneath the stars.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its bedtime, but Peppa is not sleepy, so Daddy Pig tells Peppa and George a story about a pretty princess and a dinosaur.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig has a surprise for Peppa and George, a beautiful treehouse in his garden.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George have a fancy dress party and all their friends are invited. Peppa dresses as a fairy princess and George as a scary dinosaur.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a museum, and Peppa likes the Kings and Queens room, whereas Georges favourite is the dinosaur room.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim has a clear out of all his old stuff but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish tip.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.sub-title: Nanny Plum and the Wise Old Elf Swap Jobs For One Whole Day

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Leopold, has announced he is paying a visit to The Little Kingdom. Everyone is very excited that they have a VIP coming and prepare to welcome him in style.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Mr Elf has built a new boat to replace the one Big Bad Barry ate. He is nervous when the king commands him to take them on a cruise to a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Ben and Holly want to play with Gaston the ladybird but he is missing. Nanny Plum uses her magic crystal ball to find him, and discover his daily routine is not what they thought.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.sub-title: Paddington and the Meteor Shower; Paddington and the Talent Show

programme.title: Gabbys Dollhouse
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats need to make a special art project for Baby Boxs Meow-Seum Day; with many different ways to make art, who knows what theyll create.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George want to jump in muddy puddles, but Mummy tells them to go in the pool.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Chloe has a new puppet theatre and she helps Peppa and George to make puppets. After lunch, they put on a very funny puppet show about a pig who snores a lot, but Daddy Pig and Uncle Pig miss the show, theyre far too busy snoring.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig loves to watch television, but Peppa Pig thinks that he needs to do some exercise. She says that Daddy Pigs tummy is looking a bit big. programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George have to tidy their bedroom. After a frenzy of cleaning, the room is tidy, however the room doesnt stay tidy for long though.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are at the playground with their friends. Peppa loves to play on the swings, but George is a bit afraid of heights and doesnt like to be pushed too high.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig has a lovely new picture of Peppa and George, so Daddy Pig offers to put it up, but its not as simple as Daddy Pig thought, and he makes a very big hole in the wall.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go to the beach and have fun burying Daddy Pig in the sand.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When George finds a spider in the bathroom, Peppa is very frightened until she realises that it doesnt want to hurt her.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Its the Roar festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space

programme.title: Tim Rex In Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: Blues Clues and You!
programme.desc: Joining Josh and Blue at school for a day of trying new things! Josh is excited to try being teacher for the day, but Blue seems nervous to try something new.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The elves give the King some chickens from the Elf Farm so that he can have eggs whenever he likes.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Lucy and her dad are having a relaxing day boating on the lake. They fish out an old glittery mirror from the bottom of the lake, but it belongs to a mermaid who would like it back.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.sub-title: Daisy and Poppys Trip to the Museum
programme.desc: The naughty toddlers cause chaos during a trip to the big museum.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Meet fairy princess Holly and her elf best friend Ben.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig have a beautiful little boat, and Peppa and George are spending the day on the river with them.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig, Peppa and George go to the supermarket, and George sits in the trolley while Peppa finds the things on Mummys shopping list.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its Peppa Pigs birthday so she awakens very early. First, Peppa gets a present from Mummy, Daddy and George, and then its time for her party. Daddy Pig does some funny magic tricks and makes a birthday cake appear with four candles for Peppa to blow out.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig gets a new movie camera, and everyone laughs when they see Peppa on TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family win a trip to America to star in Super Potatos movie, `Vegetables in Space. programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are driving in their large campervan across America to get to Hollywood. They stop at a diner to ask for directions and meet another Miss Rabbit. programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family continue driving across America to get to Hollywood. programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.sub-title: Paddington and the Lost Gerbil; Paddington Earns a Ranger Badge
programme.desc: Paddington accidentally releases the school pet gerbil that Judy is looking after; Jonathan and Paddington must get their Ranger badges, but Mr. Curry is not happy with them in house.

programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Swept-Away Sweetheart / Mystery of the Missing Kitties

programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to animate their drawings at playgroup.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a cold day, Daddy Pig suggests they build a den until Mummy Pig has finished work. After a hard days work, the cushion den is a perfect place to watch TV together!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesnt beat their old TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A storm cancels Peppa and her familys adventure plans so they decide to take it inside. Using their imagination, they go sledding, climb a mountain and have a campfire in the attic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in their pool. They help the garden animals cool down but when it rains, the animals are happy and so is Peppa. Rain makes muddy puddles for jumping in!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are in Granny and Grandpa Pigs Garden. Grannys friends are playing folk music! They play music for Grandpa Pig and then Grandpa Pig makes apple juice for everyone!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It is bedtime and Peppa calls Kylie Kangaroo and is surprised to learn that it is not morning or winter where she is! Daddy Pig explains this using a big ball to represent the Earth.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While visiting Suzy and Emilys house, Peppa is surprised that there are extra rules which she does not have in her own house. On the drive home, Peppa explains to Mummy Pig that different houses have different rules.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is confirming she is having a new baby. Mummy and Daddy Pig share the exciting news with Peppa and her brother, George.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are on the search for a new home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family renovate their home.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: With the building work complete, its time to decorate! Peppa and George have fun choosing how to decorate their new attic bedrooms. Its dinosaurs for George, but what will Peppa pick?

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppas family car breaks down. While it is being repaired, they borrow a shiny new one from Grandad Dogs garage.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig are taking Peppa and George to a festival - a jigsaw festival! Peppa is amazed by all of the completed jigsaws around the festival.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle is making a wicker basket. She explains it is her hobby - something you do to relax. The children discuss hobbies and learn about each others favourite things to do.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig and Peppa are at Granny Pigs house. They find Mummys old patchwork quilt that Granny made for her as a baby. Peppa decides shed like to make one for the baby!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is out with Suzy and Granny Sheep in Mummy Sheeps car. They come across an old van that Miss Rabbit is recycling. Granny Sheep decides she would like to turn it into an art van.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny Sheep is driving Vanessa, the art van along the road with Peppa, Suzy, Pedro, Mandy, Molly and Danny. They are taking her to Grampy Rabbits boat yard, for her first-ever outing!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While Mummy and Daddy Pig attend a refresher antenatal class, Peppa and George join Miss Rabbits Sibling School where they learn about what to expect when their new sibling arrives.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is so excited to meet her new baby brother or sister, but they are taking forever to arrive until suddenly Mummy Pig announces the baby is coming, now!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is determined to find the perfect name for the baby.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The nurse is popping around, and she decides that todays visit should be all about how to hold a baby. The nurse shows Peppa a special way for a small person to safely hold a baby.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a day out with her family, Peppa is encouraged to find words to describe the different kinds of puddles they find.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse joins Peppas playgroup. She uses a wheelchair and is super sporty. The children have a lot of fun playing together.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children how to play the recorder. They practise a lot at home, then put on a performance for all the parents to enjoy.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to go to her relaxation class, but relaxing proves more difficult than expected. However, thanks to Daddy Pigs bouncy castle, they all have fun in the end.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig is given a parking ticket, Peppa and George learn that adults have rules just like children - and that they get told off too.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A new synthesiser arrives for Daddy Pig, and his family collect sounds for it from around the house while he is out at work.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: During a picnic in her garden, cousin Chloe shows Peppa and George fun things to do with flowers.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Rebecca and Richard Rabbit are playing a marble run game at Peppas house. But when Daddy Pig joins in and improvises tunnels and bridges, the marble rolls out of the bedroom, causing chaos and nearly knocking Goldie out of her bowl.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When George loses the metal wind-up key for his toy robot in the long grass, Grandpa Pig cannot find his metal detector to help George track it down.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: For World Book Day, the playgroup must dress up as a character from their favourite book. But Peppa cant decide which as she has so many favourites.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy all go on a lovely trip to the childrens festival. There is lots to see and do, including singing, making crafts and listening to stories.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Day two at the festival and it has rained all night. The festival is very muddy and Peppa is thrilled. Luckily, it rains every year and Miss Rabbit is prepared with lots of muddy activities.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders
programme.desc: Focuses on the notorious house which the couple shared in Gloucester. Fred and Rose murdered their first three victims - Anna McFall, Charmaine West and then Rena Costello - because they `got in the way. But when they moved into 25 Cromwell Street, the couple began to kill for sexual thrills.

programme.title: Fred and Rose: The West Murders

programme.title: Holiday Love Rats Exposed
programme.desc: First of a three-part documentary series about people who have been conned out of money and left broken-hearted by someone they met on holiday.

programme.title: Holiday Love Rats Exposed

programme.title: Holiday Love Rats Exposed

programme.desc: Jay Blades and the team bring four treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. First is a poignant story of a very precious keepsake. Rose Werner and her sister Linda have travelled from Essex in the hope that Suzie Fletcher can turn her expertise to a decorative leather box that they hold dear. It belonged to Roses late husband Jim. He arrived in the UK as a teenage refugee just before the Second World War, thanks to the Kindertransport scheme.

programme.title: Long Lost Family

Meanwhile, Teleena Faux always believed she was the youngest of six siblings until she found evidence of a younger brother. Teleena has been desperate to find him ever since.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Mercenary Josh Hartnett is assigned a target on a flight. But when rival assassins board the plane, assassin and target are forced to team up. Gory action thriller. (2025, 98 mins)

programme.title: The Hurricane Heist
programme.desc: A team of mercenaries and hackers plan to steal 600 million dollars from the US Treasury, located on the Gulf Coast of Alabama, using a devastating hurricane as their cover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a gang of LA street racers while investigating a rash of truck robberies.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Jurassic Park is now called Jurassic World, a fully functional dinosaur park that sees 20,000 visitors a year, the realisation of owner John Hammonds dreams. The scientists may have gone too far in creating some sort of hybrid dinosaur, which escapes and terrorises the park.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Mercenary Josh Hartnett is assigned a target on a flight. But when rival assassins board the plane, assassin and target are forced to team up. Gory action thriller. (2025, 98 mins)

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Thriller set at the Stanley Cup ice hockey finals. Its Game 7 and the winner will lift the trophy but with the Vice President attending, criminal Joshua Foss has his eyes on a bigger prize. Holding the VP hostage, his demands are backed up by the shooting of selected hostages and the threat of bombs planted around the stadium. However, rink security guard McCord, whose kids are in the crowd, refuses to be cowed.

programme.title: Hounds of War
programme.desc: A mercenary seeks revenge after his entire team gets wiped out during a final mission.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Fast Cars
programme.desc: Gear up for upcoming blockbuster Fast X and buckle in for a countdown of the best cars from each of the Fast and Furious films, from Brians Toyota Supra to Doms Dodge Charger.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, rescue diver Jonas Taylor must save the crew and the ocean itself from an unimaginable threat: a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the megalodon.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Eddie Brock is still struggling to coexist with the shape-shifting extraterrestrial Venom. When deranged serial killer Cletus Kasady also becomes host to an alien symbiote, Brock and Venom must put aside their differences to stop his reign of terror.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as theyre pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venoms home world.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: One mans brutal campaign for vengeance takes on national stakes after its revealed hes a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as Beekeepers.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Diana, princess of the Amazons, is raised to be an unconquerable warrior on a sheltered island paradise. She discovers her full powers and true destiny after leaving home to join the fight to end all wars.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: A janitor becomes a social outcast when a freak accident at a chemical factory turns him into a mutant. However, he soon uses his newfound superhuman strength to battle slimy criminals and a corrupt CEO.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Open Season 3
programme.desc: After Boog switches places with a circus bear, Elliott and the gang must rescue him before the circus returns home to Russia.

programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: Were the Millers
programme.desc: Indebted to a big-time drug lord, a pot dealer travels to Mexico with a fake family and a camper to pick up a large shipment and smuggle it into the U.S.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack Malik is a struggling singer-songwriter in an English seaside town whose dreams of fame are rapidly fading, despite the fierce devotion and support of his childhood best friend, Ellie. After a freak bus accident during a mysterious global blackout, Jack wakes up to discover that The Beatles have never existed. Performing songs by the greatest band in history to a world that has never heard them, Jack becomes on overnight sensation with a little help from his agent.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When Annie and Jay first met, they had an instant and intense romantic connection. However, 10 years and two children later, the flames of passion have dimmed to dull embers. To bring the spark back to their relationship, Annie and Jay decide to record themselves trying out every position in "The Joy of Sex." It seems like a great idea -- until they discover that their private recording has gone public via the Internet.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: When Pete and Ellie decide to start a family, they stumble into the world of foster care adoption. They hope to take in one small child, but when they meet three siblings, including a rebellious 15-year-old girl, they find themselves speeding from zero to three kids overnight. Now, Pete and Ellie must try to learn the ropes of instant parenthood in the hope of becoming a family.

programme.title: The 40-Year-Old Virgin
programme.desc: Electronics store stock boy Andy Stitzer is horrified when he is found out as a virgin by his workmates - just when he thought he was becoming one of the gang. David, Jay and Cal surprise him by making it their mission to get him a girl and help him lose his virginity.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality
programme.desc: An uncouth FBI agent goes undercover in the Miss United States beauty pageant as a contestant to flush out a terrorist who plans to bomb the event. The hard-nosed cop, who prides herself on her toughness, must discard her trainers and feminise her behaviour if she is to avoid blowing her cover.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: Satirical `rockumentary following ageing British heavy metal band Spinal Tap - David St Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel, Derek Smalls and their latest hapless drummer - on the comeback trail, promoting their album `Smell the Glove on a US tour. The film features many moments that have passed into legend, including exploding drummers and amplifiers that go up to 11.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old struggling with obsessive-compulsive disorder reconnects with her childhood crush, she faces the potential of finding love and happiness despite her mental condition.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: The youngest wing commander in the history of the Royal Air Force, 21-year-old Brendan Spitfire Paddy Finucane became one of the most celebrated fighter aces of the Second World War.

programme.title: Ill Be Right There
programme.desc: A woman navigates the challenges of her pregnant daughters wedding plans, her mothers health concerns, her sons uncertain future, and her own romantic dilemmas.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha became close friends while working together at the same magazine. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood
programme.desc: John Singletons portrait of black youths struggling to survive the poverty and violence of urban Los Angeles. It follows three youths as they confront the reality of life in South Central.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Set to his most beloved songs, its the epic musical story of Elton John, his breakthrough years in the 1970s and his fantastical transformation from shy piano prodigy to international superstar and pop icon.

programme.title: Valentines Day
programme.desc: Following a group of Los Angeles residents who try to find their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Shamrock Spitfire
programme.desc: The youngest wing commander in the history of the Royal Air Force, 21-year-old Brendan Spitfire Paddy Finucane became one of the most celebrated fighter aces of the Second World War.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: Cicada
programme.desc: Ben, a young bisexual man, comes out to the world and develops an intense relationship with Sam, a closeted man struggling with deep wounds of his own. As summer progresses and their intimacy grows, secrets from the past come to light.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Two adopted brothers and rival dancers are thrust together when they are both invited to audition for the World Breaking Championships.

programme.title: Batteries not Included
programme.desc: A group of New York tenement dwellers face eviction and receive help from an unlikely source. Just when it seems that nothing short of a miracle will save their homes, a miracle is just what they get in the shape of tiny visitors from outer space whose magical powers have the bad guys on the run.

programme.title: The Ogglies
programme.desc: Young Max meets the Ogglies, a family of green, garbage-eating creatures who live at the dump in the town of Smelliville. When a contractor plans to build a wellness temple at the dump, Max and his pal must hatch a plan to save the Ogglies home.

programme.title: Fox and Hare Save the Forest
programme.desc: One day, Fox and Hare discover that Owl has disappeared. They go looking for him in the forest with all their friends and discover a big lake that wasnt there before. It is the beginning of an exciting and funny adventure.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. When Lyra comes into possession of an alethiometer, a compass that truthfully answers any question, there are people who will do anything to get hold of it, and Lyra finds herself on an epic quest to the frozen North to safeguard the future of her entire world.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Ogre Shrek and his new wife Fiona are surprised to discover a letter from her parents, inviting them over for dinner. Fiona is eager to show off her new husband, but her parents dont yet know shes an ogre. Taking Donkey along, they set off for Far Far Away to visit them, but the trip is hampered by the jealousy of a wicked fairy godmother and her hired assassin, Puss in Boots.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Visually exuberant tale about a neurotic ant who struggles to express his individuality in a colony of conformists. He attempts to break from his totalitarian society while at the same time trying to win the affection of the princess he loves.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A domesticated terrier and his unruly canine pal encounter a rebellious bunny and his gang of abandoned pets.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: Shrek is just starting to settle down in his beloved swamp with his wife Fiona, but their mucky bliss doesnt last for long as word arrives that the ogres froggy father-in-law is about to croak. The very last thing Shrek wants is to become King, but with no other heir in sight, it looks like the grumpy green one is destined never to live quietly in the swamp again. A glimmer of hope appears in the form of heir Artie.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Sky Originals
programme.desc: Not sure what to watch next? Then discover some of the greatest British Sky Originals. From Four Kids and It to SAS Red Notice, theres something here for everyone.

programme.title: ...And Justice for All
programme.desc: Satirical drama in which an idealistic lawyer who tries to win cases for clients trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system finds himself defending a venal and self-righteous judge accused of rape. The judge wrongly assumes the lawyers ideals and disdain for the courts will drive him to get an acquittal, despite the evidence and the loathing they have for each other.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Melancholia
programme.desc: A German ex-pat living in London is confronted by his past when hes asked to assassinate a Chilean murderer who is visiting London.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Richard Kembles wife is murdered and he is arrested for the crime. He soon realises he has been framed, and while being transported on a prison bus, he manages to escape. On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: Soviet and American forces give chase when the captain of a Soviet nuclear submarine sets a course for the Maine coast.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: Andy Dufresne and Ellis Boyd `Red Redding are two prisoners serving long sentences in the vicious Shawshank jail. The two come to terms with their imprisonment while surviving the sadistic acts of prison warden Samuel Norton, and for both, a different sort of redemption awaits.

programme.title: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: At the opening party of a colossal, but poorly constructed office building, a massive fire breaks out that threatens to destroy the tower and everyone in it.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: While visiting London with his family, Jack Ryan foils an IRA attempt to assassinate a government minister, killing one of the attackers in the process. Swearing vengeance, the IRAs Sean Miller follows Ryan and his family to their seaside home in America where he and his followers plan to exact their revenge.

programme.desc: A soldier who was killed in action gets caught up in a time loop, in which he repeatedly relives his last battle. However, the more times he fights, the closer he gets to discovering how to defeat the alien enemy.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045 the planet is on the brink of chaos and collapse, but people find salvation in the OASIS: an expansive virtual reality universe created by eccentric James Halliday. When Halliday dies, he promises his immense fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg thats hidden somewhere in the OASIS. When young Wade Watts joins the contest, he finds himself becoming an unlikely hero in a reality-bending treasure hunt through a fantastical world of mystery, discovery and danger.

Unfortunately, a gang of Japanese Yakuza mobsters are after whats in his head.

programme.title: It Feeds
programme.desc: A clairvoyant therapist confronts her own personal demons while trying to save a young girl who believes a malevolent entity is feeding on her.

programme.title: Beast of War
programme.desc: During World War II, a Japanese fighter sinks an Australian warship in the Timor Sea. Clinging to a makeshift raft, a handful of soldiers soon find themselves in a desperate fight for survival as a great white shark circles in the water.

programme.title: The Accursed

programme.title: IT
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the towns children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites

programme.title: The Watched
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: The Shining
programme.desc: Frustrated writer Jack Torrance takes a job as the winter caretaker at the ominous, mountain-locked Overlook Hotel so that he can write in peace. When he arrives there with his wife and son, they learn that the previous caretaker had gone mad. Slowly Jack becomes possessed by the evil, demonic presence in the hotel.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.title: Seven
programme.desc: Two detectives are in search of a serial killer who seems to be exacting retribution for the seven deadly sins. In his final week on the force, veteran Detective William Somerset is drawn back into the decay of the city as he and Detective David Mills, his cocky replacement, hunt the maniac.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novice on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate. Together, they uncover the orders unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

programme.title: The Damned
programme.desc: Fighting for survival at an isolated fishing outpost, Eva and her crew are cursed after making the choice to not help a sinking ship off the coast. Facing the consequences, a darkness consumes them all, creating chaos and death at every turn.

programme.title: The Damned
programme.desc: Fighting for survival at an isolated fishing outpost, Eva and her crew are cursed after making the choice to not help a sinking ship off the coast. Facing the consequences, a darkness consumes them all, creating chaos and death at every turn.

programme.title: Sleepers
programme.desc: Eleven years after their horrific experiences at reform school, Tommy Marcano and John Reilly have become two-bit American gangsters, Lorenzo Carcaterra is a reporter and Michael Sullivan an assistant DA. The four are reunited when they chance across one of the abusive guards and take the chance for revenge.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: An honest policeman is determined to bust police corruption and the stranglehold of the Mafia. At first he innocently begins investigating the Mafia-related killing of a fellow officer, but things turn nasty when his wife is killed in a car bomb blast meant for him, his child is threatened with kidnapping and he loses his job.

programme.title: Along Came a Spider
programme.desc: A detective and a Secret Service agent investigate the abduction of a senators daughter from a school.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six government agents become trapped inside a high-security safe house after a terrorist attack in downtown Los Angeles. They soon realise they must survive not just the enemy outside, but the potential traitor among them.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Detective Riggs and Murtaugh are called into action to foil a Chinese crime lord who is selling immigrants into slavery on American soil. The pair arent as young as they used to be, and ending up on a Triad hit list doesnt make things easy for them either.

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: A juror for a high-profile murder trial finds himself struggling with a serious moral dilemma that could influence the verdict and potentially convict, or free, the accused killer.

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Seafaring drama based on the true story of a commercial fishing boat crew who become caught in a terrifying storm off the coast of Massachusetts. In the autumn of 1991, a fishing boat captain is determined to set sail despite the adverse weather conditions, but when the ice machine breaks down his decision to brave the storm rather than lose his catch results in a battle against 100ft waves.

programme.title: Black Bag
programme.desc: When his beloved wife, Kathryn, is suspected of betraying the nation, intelligence agent George Woodhouse faces the ultimate test -- loyalty to his marriage or his country.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a living nightmare when an American couple and their daughter spend the weekend at a British familys idyllic country estate.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: A hit man falls for his bosss wife when he is asked to escort her on a date, a boxer reneges on his promise to throw a big fight, and a couple attempt a heist that rapidly escalates out of control.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of Londons East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.desc: Orangutan Silvestre arrives in Switzerland to be the leader of a small group, and Alison decides the best option is to separate Sasha and Kangoo so they can have a chance at a fulfilled life.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison finds herself on a mission to rescue a marmoset that is being kept in a hamster cage, and chimp Kangoo takes his time deciding whether to venture into the outdoor enclosure.

programme.title: Extreme Africa
programme.desc: The Southern Drylands is a journey into the most arid and extreme environments in the furthest reaches of southern Africa. Spectacular but treacherous places where almost no rain falls with incredibly resilient creatures.

programme.title: Carpathian Predators
programme.desc: During the summer months, a mother brown bear struggles to find food for her two cubs and a pair of lynx kittens venture away from their den; honeybees pollinate flowers.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Every day a struggle for survival plays out across Africa. Predators binge on the dead and natures undertakers circle above waiting for their chance.

programme.title: Arabian Seas
programme.desc: As the sun heats the waters, algae spread across the coral reef and attract thousands of fish.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: The wild Pacific coast of Vancouver Island is an ancient and rugged landscape off the western shore of British Columbia. From the icy peaks of age-old mountain glaciers to the fog-shrouded canopies of Canadas only rainforest, its the wettest place in North America: a primitive habitat where the Pacific ocean holds the key to life and where nature and the human spirit coexist.

programme.title: Extreme Africa
programme.desc: The Southern Drylands is a journey into the most arid and extreme environments in the furthest reaches of southern Africa. Spectacular but treacherous places where almost no rain falls with incredibly resilient creatures.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Pacific coast of Costa Rica is a biodiversity hotspot that hosts nearly 5,000 species of marine life. But in this undersea jungle, the oceans top predators, sharks, are at risk, threatened by loss of habitat and overfishing.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: Australias birds of prey are some of the regions fiercest predators. These highly specialised killers are powerful, resourceful, striking and use some impressive weapons to survive.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Journey into impenetrable jungle, dive deep into mysterious underwater caves and wade through lush everglades that shelter Mexicos largest predator, the Morelets crocodile.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Woolly monkey Piquita requires an operation, new capuchin Louis gets a lovely perch, while the chimp team find themselves trying to navigate a double blow after two sad losses.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison visits Twycross Zoo to collect an orphaned orangutan in need of a new home, plus there is some startling news about a capuchin recently rescued from a life in the pet trade.

programme.title: Great Blue Wild
programme.desc: The Wild Coast of South Africa is comprised of rivers that empty into the sea and indigenous forest.

programme.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programme.desc: Successful breeding is critical to the survival of any bird species and this time we meet four species of birds which go to exceptional lengths to find mates and raise their young, giving the next generation the best chance of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Enchanted Waters
programme.desc: Unmask the eerie beauty of swamplands, which have inspired centuries of folklore and serve as a vital link between life and death. Swim with hungry crocodiles, see deer gamble with their lives for food, and watch carnivorous plants snap up prey.

programme.title: Wildlife Icons
programme.desc: Their ancestors were the first vertebrates to colonise dry land and frogs inhabit every continent except Antarctica, but their world is rapidly changing. What was once wetlands are now playgrounds, golf courses and race tracks.

programme.desc: Europes 12 Ryder Cup heroes tell the story of their incredible win in Chicago. programme.title: Gopala
programme.desc: A woman imprisoned for murder is spared of her death sentence since she is pregnant. She then plans to bring up her son to avenge the death of her husband. However, life has other plans in store.

programme.title: Roja
programme.desc: An innocent wifes world is shattered when militants kidnap her husband, a government official.

programme.title: Amanush
programme.desc: Madhusdan is in love with Rekha, but his reckless ways lead to another woman confiding in Rekha that he has got her pregnant.

programme.title: Chowkidar
programme.desc: Dr. Shyam is self committed to work selflessly for the betterment of the villagers. When he falls in love with Radha, the villagers do not take kindly to this romance, until and unless Shyam agrees to marry her. While his money-lender father refuses to give his blessings, Shyam is caught red-handed having an affair with another woman, who claims that she is pregnant with Shyams child.

programme.title: Doli Saja Ke Rakhna
programme.desc: Two young lovers decide to elope because their families do not approve of their relationship, but in the end they must decide to either stay together as outcasts, or salvage their relationships with their families by separating.

programme.title: Apne Paraye
programme.desc: Chander and his family are forced to leave his cousins home, where he has been living while trying to find a job, when an influential advocate moves in. Soon, the advocate claims that Chander and his wife owe him money and have been stealing from him, and takes the matter to court.

programme.title: Gardish

programme.desc: A woman looks for a way to end a curse which turns her new husband into a deadly tiger during each full moon.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Janine needs the help of the team to create a wildlife friendly garden in her bare, boring and depressing new build plot. She wants a space that is sympathetic to the Welsh countryside around her, where she can relax and practise yoga as well as sit and watch the visiting birds and bees.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Lesley longs for a garden to spend time with her two children and four grandchildren, but her bizarrely shaped plot has her flummoxed. Not only is it compact, it goes to a strange point in one corner and has a giant shed taking up one third of the space! Lee and Chris take up the challenge and offer designs reminiscent of Lesleys favourite Greek holidays. Its not long before the team begin to struggle with the odd angles in the garden.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh heads to Preston in Lancashire to surprise a young family facing an uncertain future. With the support of fiance Michael Brown, mum to Ivy, Roisin Pelan is facing stage 3C cancer. Despite enduring challenging treatment, Roisin has raised thousands for cancer charities and is determined to see her young daughter grow up. Alan and his team of experts turn Roisins dangerous sloping garden into a stunning music festival-inspired haven.

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus makes plans to expand the smallholdings herb patch. A trip to Gloucestershire to see the UKs largest herb collection shows that even someone as experienced as Marcus can still learn a lot about ingredients.

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus develops plans to create a orchard and bring in the perfect eating apple for his favourite dessert, the classic tarte Tatin. A trip to Kent introduces him to the wide range of heritage apples available in the UK, as well as giving him some tips and tricks on how to grow his own. Back at the farm, he gets a lesson on attracting pollinators, and discovers there is a whole world of edible flowers. He also cooks up some incredible Indian-style chutneys with a glut from the kitchen garden.

programme.desc: Eleanor and Rob from Hereford would love an eco-friendly garden for themselves and their two daughters to enjoy. Of primary importance to the couple is that their garden is low/no carbon and that it is friendly to the environment. They would like the garden build to be based on a `circular economy ie. any carbon spent would be offset by reusing materials. They want lots of habitats for birds, butterflies and bees and to use as many natural materials as possible.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Luke and his team have been contracted to remove two stolen vehicles from an abandoned mine site. The mine site has been turned into a recreational lake for weekend campers and water skiers. The missing cars are toxic and need to be removed. They have a 15,000-dollar budget and two days to get the job done. But there are problems: the location of the cars is unknown and the lake is overrun with holidaymakers. Theyll need to employ commercial divers to search for the missing vehicles.

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Britains most talented detectives tackle a dangerous arsonist in Bristol, a drug smuggling operation in Manchester, and a family committing shocking animal cruelty in Cheshire.

programme.title: Guy Martins WWI Tank
programme.desc: Guy Martin tries to build a full working replica of a World War One tank with the help of JCB; pass his tank driving test; and be ready in time to join Lincolns Remembrance Day parade.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team try out some of James Bonds greatest cars, including the legendary Aston Martin DB5. Freddie and an Extreme E race car take on a man with a jet pack, while Chris and Paddy test a new Ferrari against a very old Alfa.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Freddie, Chris and Paddy head out on an icy expedition across the wild Scottish Highlands in the new Land Rover Defender, Mercedes G-Wagen and Ariel Nomad. Find out which one will prove itself the ultimate off-roader.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best
programme.desc: Everyone loves a lazy weekend, and no one more than the Hairy Bikers. In this episode they go in search of mums who share their love of being lazy. Elaines family favourite, the peach paradise pudding, and heart-warming chicken pie are the perfect hors doeuvre followed by Rosalyns slow cooked beef stew and speedy plava cake. Then theres a rather savoury pudding of Jennys pickled salads for Raclette.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Luke and his team have been contracted to remove two stolen vehicles from an abandoned mine site. The mine site has been turned into a recreational lake for weekend campers and water skiers. The missing cars are toxic and need to be removed. They have a 15,000-dollar budget and two days to get the job done. But there are problems: the location of the cars is unknown and the lake is overrun with holidaymakers. Theyll need to employ commercial divers to search for the missing vehicles.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor informs the Kaled government of Davross secret experiments and they move to shut down the bunker. However, Davros is one step ahead and prepares to take drastic action.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed by the Thals rocket, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory. However, the Daleks then appear and a bloody massacre begins.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: With Harry and Sarah Jane as his prisoners, Davros interrogates the Doctor, forcing him to reveal the future of the Daleks so that he can learn from their defeats to make them stronger.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor leads a revolt of human slaves on Metebelis 3, ruled by giant spiders.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the impressive Cullen viaduct before enjoying a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. Heading west along the firth, Michael reaches Forres Station and the seaside village of Findhorn, where he meets members of an eco-community founded in the 1960s. At the Findhorn Foundation, Michael discovers spiritual energy, sacred dancing and a history of very large vegetables.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish coastal railway journey reaches Invergordon on the Cromarty Firth, the third great inlet on the northeast coast of the Highlands.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The stunning coastline of Northumberland is the setting for Michael Portillos rail adventure from the city of Newcastle to Englands northernmost town, Berwick-upon-Tweed.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: At the end of the Second World War, British troops are confronted with the true horrors of Nazi crimes when they discover Bergen Belsen concentration camp.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: As the Cold War escalates, most Nazi hunting is abandoned. Suddenly, Nazis are able to return to normal life or find refuge overseas. Thousands begin new lives in South America.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: In the 1960s and 70s, the Second World War is a distant memory, but a few diehards are determined to hunt down thousands of Nazi war criminals. Many of whom are living in plain sight.

programme.desc: Replaced at work by a box, Victor embarks on his enforced retirement. As an erstwhile security officer, he finds it exasperatingly difficult to adapt to this directionless new existence, and he begins magnifying mundane aspects of everyday life into major dramas.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret tries to help her husband cope with early retirement by getting him a book from the library entitled `Coping with Old Age. Maybe keep-fit classes at the local adult education centre will help take Victors mind off the depressing turn of events?

programme.desc: Sardonic Victors life continues to be a trial - someone paints graffiti on the side of his house and the central heating system is making a deafening noise. To add to that theres a nasty smell coming from the living-room.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team travel to Duxford near Cambridge. They enlist the aid of local trades to help Paul and Sarah Behan, who had just started an extension to their tiny bungalow when their young son Joshua was diagnosed with a rare and aggressive form of liver cancer. Joshuas cancer meant the extension had to be abandoned just when it became more necessary than ever.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: After 20 years serving his country, Royal Engineer and Paratrooper Mo Morris was given a medical discharge. He has been left struggling to walk in a home which is totally unsuitable to his needs. Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team come to his rescue.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Hayley has always wanted children but shes been anxious since her 20-week scan, which revealed that her baby has a congenital diaphragmatic hernia, an extremely rare type of hernia that occurs in one in 2,200 births. Until the baby is born its relatively safe but once its born it has to breathe for itself and thats when it is most vulnerable.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: One expectant couple have faith beyond the hospital staff, while another dad-to-be is in danger of missing out on the big moment.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its chaos for the junior doctors when the hospital computer system crashes. Zak treats a man who may have had a mini stroke, and Tej deals with two critically ill patients in resus.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Zak treats a 90-year-old woman after paramedics gave her CPR, Tristan gets a diagnosis spot-on, and Christine has a patient with an alarming combination of symptoms.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out

After massive defeats at Saipan, Iwo Jima and Okinawa, a continuous campaign of Allied bombing kills 250,000 and leaves eight million homeless.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: By 1960, one of the worlds most notorious Nazi war criminals, Adolf Eichmann, is living incognito with his family on the outskirts of Buenos Aires under the alias Ricardo Klement. Known as the architect of Hitlers `Final Solution and directly culpable for the murder of six millions Jews, the former Lieutenant Colonel of the SS is now himself a hunted man.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
